---
name: review-before-nextsteps
description: Lets review the current state of the project and make sure we moving in the right directions
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-skill in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Review code changes, look at any plans we have and asks questions for things we may have missed or that arn't working as expected.

This is a moment to assess how the project is going before we move on to any next steps in our `plans/issues` folder.

Building software is iterative so it's okay to review in case we need to update any plans we have made.
